keys.description: shared internal secret attached as X-Internal-Secret on the admin-api /internal/validate hop (adapters.py:67-69). Unset, admin-api rejects validation and EVERY API-key check 503s (fail-closed) — so the boot refuses instead of coming up green and 503ing every call (the 2026-04-23 failure shape, #526).
admin-api base URL for the /internal/validate token-resolution hop
meeting-api base URL — the proxy forward target and the /ws/authorize-subscribe hop
agent control-plane base URL fronted under /api/*
pub/sub bus backing the /ws fan-in
log verbosity
uvicorn bind host
uvicorn bind port
edge protection (fastapi-guard) master switch — ON by default (#555)
extend the edge guard to the /ws upgrade path
back the guard's rate-limit/ban buckets with Redis (shared across replicas)
per-IP request budget per window
rate-limit window (seconds)
violations before an IP is auto-banned
auto-ban duration (seconds)
comma-separated IPs never rate-limited/banned
comma-separated IPs always blocked
comma-separated proxy IPs whose X-Forwarded-For is trusted for client-IP resolution
trust X-Forwarded-Proto from the proxy for scheme resolution
comma-separated country codes to block (geo-IP)
block known cloud/hosting provider ranges
Redis key prefix for the guard's rate-limit/ban buckets
